channel.title: Outdoor Work on Niranjan Liyanage
channel.description: Recent content in Outdoor Work on Niranjan Liyanage

item.title: WorkspaceLens – Outdoor Knowledge Work Photo Collection & Analysis
item.description: WorkspaceLens is a AI-powered mobile-first Progressive Web Application (PWA) that implements the pOKW2 photo analysis model (Herneoja et al., 2023) for collecting and analysing self-reported photographs from outdoor and semi-outdoor knowledge work environments.

item.title: WorkspaceLens – Outdoor Knowledge Work Photo Collection & Analysis
